name: Rotavirus Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for rotavirus vaccines including the 2-dose (RV1, Rotarix) and 3-dose (RV5, RotaTeq) series. Used in childhood immunization status (CIS) measure. Series must begin by 14 weeks 6 days of age and complete by 8 months.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Rotavirus, live, pentavalent vaccine (RV5, RotaTeq — 3-dose series)
Rotavirus, live, monovalent vaccine (RV1, Rotarix — 2-dose series)
Rotavirus vaccine, pentavalent (RV5), 3 dose schedule, live, for oral use
Rotavirus vaccine, human, attenuated (RV1), 2 dose schedule, live, for oral use
